label: 🧠 AI & Productivity
description: Code smarter and faster with AI assistance and productivity boosters

extensions.name: GitHub Copilot
extensions.description: AI pair programmer. Suggests entire lines and functions as you type. Paid subscription.

extensions.name: GitHub Copilot Chat
extensions.description: Chat with AI about your code directly inside VS Code. Ask questions, refactor, explain.

extensions.name: Codeium
extensions.description: Free AI code completion. Works like Copilot but completely free — no subscription.

extensions.name: Bookmarks
extensions.description: Mark lines in your code and jump between them instantly with keyboard shortcuts.

extensions.name: TODO Highlight
extensions.description: Highlights TODO and FIXME comments so you never forget unfinished work.

extensions.name: Todo Tree
extensions.description: Shows all your TODOs in a sidebar tree so you can find every task across the project.

extensions.name: Import Cost
extensions.description: Shows the file size of each import inline. Keep your JavaScript bundles lean.

extensions.name: Color Highlight
extensions.description: Shows a colored square next to every hex/RGB color value in your CSS and JS files.
